summary: TruckersNav Facility POI system (iteration 10): Found and fixed a CRITICAL syntax error in NavigationView.tsx that prevented the Navigation view from rendering entirely. After fix: all 22 backend tests pass (100%), and all key frontend features verified — filter panel FACILITIES section, facilities toggle, Add Facility modal, form submission, Load Board still working.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: NavigationView.tsx lines 446-447: Duplicate/incomplete `const [poiFilters, setPoiFilters] = useState<Set<string>>(() => {` was inserted before the facility state declarations, leaving an unclosed arrow function that consumed the entire JSX return block. Vite/esbuild reported 'Expected ) but found ;' at line 5007. Fixed by removing the incomplete declaration and keeping facility state at the top level followed by the complete poiFilters useState.
PRE-EXISTING BUG (from previous iterations, unchanged): L.point().rotate() is not a standard Leaflet method — NavigationView.tsx lines 3196 and 3256. Caught by try-catch, no crash.

AddFacilityForm: submit button is disabled when `!userLocation` — requires GPS to be available in browser. In testing environments without GPS, the button will remain disabled. Consider adding a fallback to allow manual lat/lon input.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 16 review items PASS after syntax fix

test_results.app_loads_no_errors: PASS — Dashboard renders cleanly, no Vite overlay error

test_results.navigation_imports_facility_service: PASS — import { fetchFacilities, facilityIconSVG, Facility } at line 75

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed facilities during backend testing (TEST_Distribution Center Alpha, TEST_Shipper Warehouse, TEST_Crossdock DC, TEST_Persistence Check DC, TEST_Report Type Check, TEST_Report Type Check, UI Test Browser Facility). These are in /app/data/facilities.json.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack. Splash screen ~5s. Navigation view accessible via sidebar 'Navigation' link. Filter panel toggled by second icon from top on right side (funnel icon). FACILITIES section at bottom of filter panel with 'facilities-toggle' and 'add-facility-btn' testids. FacilityPanel accessed by clicking facility markers on map. Facility markers only appear when showFacilities=true AND userLocation is valid AND facilities are near user's location. Test facility exists in Michigan area (lat=43.1, lon=-84.1). Load Board (MOCKED). Compass Rose bottom-left. PRE-EXISTING BUG: L.point().rotate() at NavigationView.tsx lines 3196 & 3256 (try-caught, no crash).
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: NavigationView.tsx syntax error at line 446-447. The E1 agent inserted the facility state declarations by mistakenly prepending a partial `const [poiFilters, setPoiFilters] = useState<Set<string>>(() => {` (without closing the arrow function) immediately before the facility state. This left the poiFilters arrow function body open, causing all subsequent code (facility state declarations, the real poiFilters declaration, and the rest of the component) to be parsed as the body of the unclosed arrow function. Esbuild/Babel then reported 'Expected ) but found ;' at the very last line (5007) because the return() parentheses were consumed by the JS expression inside the unclosed arrow function body. FIX: Removed lines 446-447 (the incomplete partial declaration) so facility state is placed cleanly at top-level before the complete poiFilters useState declaration.
